name: list_drafts
description: List Typefully drafts. Can filter by status (draft, scheduled, published). Use this to see existing drafts before creating or editing.

status.description: Filter by status: draft, scheduled, or published (leave empty for all)

limit.description: Maximum number of drafts to return

name: create_draft
description: Create a new Typefully draft. Supports single tweets, threads (separated by ---), and multi-platform posting (x, linkedin, threads, bluesky, mastodon). Can also schedule the draft for a specific time.

text.description: The text content of the draft. For threads, separate posts with '---'

is_thread.description: Whether this is a thread (multiple posts separated by ---)

platforms.description: Comma-separated platforms: x, linkedin, threads, bluesky, mastodon (default: x)

schedule.description: Schedule time: ISO 8601 (e.g., 2026-03-01T09:00:00Z), 'next-free-slot', or empty for draft

name: get_draft
description: Get full details of a specific Typefully draft by its ID. Use this to view the complete content before editing.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to retrieve

name: edit_draft
description: Edit an existing Typefully draft. Supports updating text and changing platform settings. Use get_draft first to see current content.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to edit

text.description: New text content. For threads, separate posts with '---'

is_thread.description: Whether this is a thread (multiple posts separated by ---)

platforms.description: Comma-separated platforms: x, linkedin, threads, bluesky, mastodon (default: x)

name: schedule_draft
description: Schedule a Typefully draft for publication or publish immediately. Use 'now' to publish immediately, 'next-free-slot' for queue scheduling, or provide an ISO 8601 timestamp.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to schedule

schedule_time.description: Schedule time: ISO 8601 (e.g., 2026-03-01T09:00:00Z), 'next-free-slot', or 'now' for immediate publish

name: delete_draft
description: Delete a Typefully draft by its ID. This action cannot be undone.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to delete

name: list_social_sets
description: List available Typefully social sets (accounts). Use this to find your social set ID if you have multiple accounts.
